sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Citigroup to redeem Series W preferred stock
feed.summary: Citigroup has announced its intention to redeem all outstanding shares of its Fixed-to-Floating Rate Noncumulative Preferred Stock, Series W, on October 30, 2023. The redemption price for each share will be $25.00 plus any accumulated unpaid dividends. This move will affect shares currently held under the ticker symbol C.PR.W.

feed.title: Fiserv (NASDAQ: FISV) posts 0.8% small business sales gain as Black Friday lifts index
feed.summary: Fiserv's Small Business Index eased to 142 in November 2025, with sales growing 0.8% year-over-year despite a slight decline in transactions. Strong Black Friday sales, particularly in core retail and restaurants, helped buoy an otherwise flat month for small businesses. Consumers showed pragmatic spending habits, opting for lower-cost options and prioritizing essentials.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE: ICE) Sets Record OI at 112.9M Lots in November
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) reported its November 2025 trading volume statistics, highlighting a 5% year-over-year increase in total average daily volume (ADV) and a 14% rise in open interest (OI), reaching a record of 112.9 million lots. The report detailed significant growth across various asset classes, including energy, financials, and interest rates, with several categories setting new ADV and OI records. This performance underscores ICE's continued strength in derivatives markets and its role in connecting global financial markets.

feed.title: Commvault (NASDAQ: CVLT) to Demo AI-Powered Cyber Recovery at Gartner IOCS 2025
feed.summary: Commvault (NASDAQ: CVLT) will demonstrate its AI-enabled cyber resilience and rapid recovery innovations, including Synthetic Recovery and Identity Resilience, at the Gartner IT Infrastructure, Operations & Cloud Strategies (IOCS) Conference from December 9-11, 2025, in Las Vegas. Global Field CTO Rahul Pawar will lead a session on unified cyber resilience with AI for hybrid and cloud environments. The company will showcase technologies from its SHIFT 2025 event at Booth #344, inviting attendees to register for meetings and access on-demand content.

feed.title: Is Keurig Dr Pepper Stock Underperforming the Dow?
feed.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) has seen its stock underperform the Dow Jones Industrial Average (DOWI) over the past three months, six months, and 52 weeks, despite strong brand recognition and robust Q3 earnings. The stock is down 22.1% from its 52-week high, while the Dow has seen significant gains. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for KDP, projecting a potential upside of 23.1%.

feed.title: Is Digital Realty Trust Stock Underperforming the Nasdaq?
feed.summary: Digital Realty Trust (DLR), a large-cap global REIT, has significantly underperformed the Nasdaq Composite over the past three months, 52 weeks, and year-to-date, despite solid Q3 earnings. The company, valued at $53.7 billion, has seen its shares drop by 19.4% from its 52-week high. Analysts, however, maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price suggesting a 25.9% premium.

feed.title: ADP: US private payrolls down by 31K in November
feed.summary: US private businesses recorded a decrease of 31,000 non-farm payrolls in November, according to ADP, a significant downturn after October's revised increase of 106,000. This report was softer than expected, with professional and business services seeing the largest decline, while leisure and hospitality experienced the most significant gain. The ADP report precedes the official US employment situation report by the US Department of Labor.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb stock rises after continuing Phase 3 Alzheimer’s study
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb stock rose 1.5% after the company announced its decision to continue its ADEPT-2 Phase 3 study for psychosis associated with Alzheimer’s disease. The company excluded data from certain sites due to irregularities but maintained the study's integrity, seeking FDA consultation and independent analysis. New patient enrollment will proceed to meet the original target population, with results expected by the end of 2026 for the drug Cobenfy.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend of $0.72 per Common Share for 4Q25, a Decrease of $0.60, or 45%, Compared to 3Q25
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. announced a significant reduction in its quarterly cash dividend for the fourth quarter of 2025 to $0.72 per common share, representing a 45% decrease from the previous quarter. This decision aims to strengthen the company's balance sheet, enhance financial flexibility, and preserve approximately $410 million in annual liquidity. Despite the cut, the dividend still offers an attractive yield of 5.4% based on recent stock prices.

feed.title: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend of $0.72 per Common Share for 4Q25, a Decrease of $0.60, or 45%, Compared to 3Q25
feed.summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. announced a significant reduction in its quarterly cash dividend for the fourth quarter of 2025, declaring $0.72 per common share, a 45% decrease from the previous quarter. This decision aims to strengthen the company's balance sheet, enhance financial flexibility, and preserve approximately $410 million in annual liquidity, while still providing an attractive yield of 5.4% on its common stock.

feed.title: ADP (NASDAQ: ADP) reports private jobs down 32,000 as pay growth slows to 4.4%
feed.summary: ADP reported a decrease of 32,000 private sector jobs in November 2025, contrasting with slight gains from large and medium establishments. Annual pay growth slowed for both job-stayers (4.4%) and job-changers (6.3%), indicating a cooling labor market. The decrease was broad-based but more pronounced in small businesses and specific sectors like information and manufacturing.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories Updates on DSA Trends at Conference
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories presented at the Evercore Healthcare Conference on December 3, 2025, to discuss demand trends for DSA. The company highlighted improvements in DSA net book-to-bill monthly since Q3 2025, noting positive momentum since mid-2025, though holiday seasonality might impact short-term bookings. This information was originally filed with the SEC.

feed.title: Charles River Labs Joins Evercore Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories (CRL) will attend the Evercore Healthcare Conference on December 3, 2025, to discuss fourth-quarter demand trends. The company reports improved DSA net book-to-bill ratios and positive momentum, despite potential seasonal impacts. An analyst has issued a Buy rating with a $200.00 price target for CRL stock, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst indicates a Neutral stance due to strong revenue growth and cash flow offset by profitability challenges and valuation concerns.

feed.title: Baker Hughes | We Take Energy Forward
feed.summary: Baker Hughes is an energy technology company focused on making energy safer, cleaner, and more efficient. They offer a diverse portfolio of solutions across oilfield services, liquefied natural gas (LNG), industrial technology, and energy transition, aiming to maximize productivity, reduce emissions, and drive decarbonization efforts. The company highlights its commitment to sustainability, innovation, and its people, as reflected in its annual reports and energy forward stories.

feed.title: ValueMomentum Designated as Leader and Star Performer in Everest Group's P&C Insurance IT Services PEAK Matrix
feed.summary: ValueMomentum has been recognized as a Leader and Star Performer in Everest Group's 2025 P&C Insurance IT Services PEAK Matrix report, acknowledging its focused approach on P&C insurance and its ability to deliver measurable outcomes. The company was lauded for its specialized expertise, organizational structure centered on insurance value streams, and verticalized solution offerings including catastrophe modeling and GenAI integration. This recognition highlights ValueMomentum's commitment to providing innovative solutions that drive growth, efficiency, and customer experience for insurers.

feed.title: Three proposed NYC casinos move closer to approval after key state board vote
feed.summary: Plans for three New York City casinos have moved closer to reality after the New York State Gaming Facility Location Board recommended Bally's Bronx, Hard Rock Metropolitan Park, and Resorts World New York City for licensure consideration. These projects are projected to generate significant tax revenue and create thousands of jobs, despite concerns raised about problem gambling interventions and development timelines. The final decision now rests with the state Gaming Commission.

feed.title: Citigroup Announces Full Redemption of Series W Preferred Stock
feed.summary: Citigroup Inc. announced the full redemption of all $1.5 billion aggregate liquidation preference of its Series W Depositary Shares, representing interests in its 4.000% Fixed Rate Reset Noncumulative Preferred Stock, Series W. The redemption date is set for December 10, 2025, with a cash redemption price of $1,000 per Depositary Share. This action is part of Citigroup’s liability management strategy to enhance its funding and capital structure efficiency.

feed.title: MGM Resorts International (MGG.DE) Surges on Robust Performance in Germany's Entertainment Sector
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International (MGG.DE) saw an impressive 13.99% surge on the XETRA exchange, becoming a top gainer in the entertainment sector. This performance is driven by strong fundamentals, including a market capitalization of €11.39 billion and a PE ratio of 13.78, despite a contraction in net income growth. Technical indicators also suggest positive momentum, with the stock surpassing key moving averages and benefiting from a positive sector outlook and global reopening trends.

feed.title: Johnson & Johnson Teams Up with Naomi Watts to Reveal Why an Eye Exam is the Ultimate Self-Care Move for Women Over 40
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson has partnered with Naomi Watts to highlight the importance of eye exams for women over 40, framing them as a crucial aspect of self-care and healthy aging. A new survey reveals that while clear vision is valued for confidence and youthfulness, many Americans neglect routine eye checks despite hormonal changes impacting vision with age. The initiative aims to raise awareness about common age-related vision conditions like presbyopia and cataracts, and how annual eye exams can detect not only these but also over 270 other health conditions, empowering women to prioritize eye health for overall well-being.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. at the Citi 2025 Global Healthcare Conference
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. announced its participation in the Citi 2025 Global Healthcare Conference, scheduled for December 3, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. EST. The company provides details for adding the event to various calendars and contact information for investor inquiries. Key investor resources, including financial information, stock data, and investor services, are also highlighted.

feed.title: 2025 Healthy Outcomes Conference: Henry Schein Canada reducing disability leave claims with wellness program
feed.summary: Henry Schein Canada has successfully reduced disability leave claims and improved employee engagement through its comprehensive wellness program. The program, launched in 2023, focuses on five pillars: mental, physical, financial, social, and work-life balance, and has achieved a 90% employee approval rating. Investments in mental health initiatives, including wellness champions and leadership training, have also resulted in a significant return on investment for the company.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Exane Initiates Honeywell International at Neutral With $195 Price Target
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has initiated coverage on Honeywell International (HON) with a "Neutral" rating and a price target of $195. This report comes amid other recent analyst rating changes and news concerning the company's deals and business activities.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Healthcare Companies: Pacira Pharmaceuticals (PCRX), Pfizer (PFE) and Janux Therapeutics Inc (JANX)
feed.summary: This article details conflicting analyst sentiments on three healthcare companies: Pacira Pharmaceuticals (PCRX), Pfizer (PFE), and Janux Therapeutics Inc (JANX). Analysts provide ratings, price targets, and their success rates, indicating moderate buy for Pacira, hold for Pfizer, and strong buy for Janux. The reports highlight the potential upside for each stock from current levels.

feed.title: Analysts Conflicted on These Healthcare Names: Merck & Company (MRK), Alibaba Health Information Technology (OtherALBHF) and Janux Therapeutics Inc (JANX)
feed.summary: Analysts are divided on several healthcare stocks, including Merck & Company (MRK), Alibaba Health Information Technology (ALBHF), and Janux Therapeutics Inc (JANX). Merck received a Hold rating from Bernstein and BMO Capital. Alibaba Health Information Technology also got a Hold rating from Goldman Sachs, while Janux Therapeutics Inc received Buy ratings from Stifel Nicolaus and LifeSci Capital, indicating a strong upside potential.

feed.title: Zluri Named in the Gartner® Report: Reduce Your IAM Attack Surface Using Visibility, Observability, and Remediation
feed.summary: Zluri has been recognized in a Gartner® report titled "Reduce Your IAM Attack Surface Using Visibility, Observability, and Remediation," highlighting its role in enhancing identity visibility and reducing identity-related risks. The company's Next-Gen IGA platform offers a patented discovery engine for comprehensive visibility across identity and application landscapes, helping uncover Shadow IT and AI risks. Zluri also introduced new features like customizable BI dashboards and App Insights to turn identity data into actionable decisions and remediation support.

feed.title: Is Crown Castle Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: Crown Castle Inc. (CCI) stock has significantly underperformed the S&P 500 across various timeframes, including a 10% decline over the past three months compared to the S&P 500's 6.5% uptick. Despite this underperformance and a bearish trend indicated by moving averages, the company's Q3 results slightly exceeded consensus estimates for topline and adjusted funds from operations. Analysts currently rate CCI as a "Moderate Buy" with a substantial upside potential.

feed.title: Home Depot: Risk-Reward Not Attractive Relative To The Market (NYSE:HD)
feed.summary: Home Depot's Q3 results showed flat performance after adjusting for an acquisition, with comparable sales barely positive, leading to a Hold rating due to persistent macro headwinds and a delayed recovery. Despite some signs of stabilization such as digital channel growth and high-income consumer spending, the near-term outlook remains uninspiring. The analyst maintains a Hold rating given concerns about the US housing situation and elevated interest rates.

feed.title: TJX price tries to gather positive momentum - Forecast today - 03-12-2025
feed.summary: TJX Companies, Inc. (TJX) is showing signs of decline due to negative RSI indicators but is attempting to regain positive momentum, supported by trading above its 50-day Simple Moving Average. The forecast predicts a rise if the stock remains above the $145.00 support level, targeting the $154.65 resistance. Other analyses for Autodesk, PayPal, and Pfizer are also included, with Autodesk and Pfizer predicted to rise and PayPal to decline.

feed.title: RBC Capital Markets hires Citigroup dealmaker Weissenberger
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has hired Sean Weissenberger from Citigroup to lead its chemicals investment banking coverage in Europe. This move is part of RBC's ongoing expansion in the region. Weissenberger will serve as head of chemicals investment banking for Europe at the Canadian lender.

feed.title: United airlines and travelport form strategic partnership to enhance NDC By Investing.com
feed.summary: United Airlines and Travelport have formed a strategic partnership to enhance airline retailing capabilities using New Distribution Capability (NDC) technology. This multi-year agreement grants Travelport early access to United's NDC roadmap and fosters co-development of new features for travel agencies and corporate buyers. The collaboration aims to integrate United's Online Booking Tool extras into Travelport's Deem OBT platform, starting in early 2026.

feed.title: Caterpillar price readies to tackle pivotal resistance - Forecast today - 03-12-2025
feed.summary: Caterpillar (CAT) is poised to challenge the pivotal resistance level of $596.20, supported by its 50-day SMA and an ascending trend. However, overbought RSI levels and potential negative crossovers could temper rapid gains. The forecast is bullish if the stock breaks $596.20, targeting $632.95 next.

feed.title: Pfizer price leans on SMA support - Forecast today - 03-12-2025
feed.summary: Pfizer (PFE) is showing negative signals from RSI indicators but is expected to rise in upcoming trading, supported by its 50-day SMA and an ascending trend, provided it remains above $24.95, targeting a resistance level at $26.10. Meanwhile, Caterpillar (CAT) is preparing to break resistance at $596.20, although overbought RSI levels may limit rapid gains. Bitcoin and Ethereum are also navigating overbought conditions while attempting to maintain gains and break resistance levels respectively.

feed.title: QQQ ETF Daily Update, 12/3/2025
feed.summary: The Invesco QQQ Trust ETF saw a 0.78% increase on Tuesday, driven by a rebound in tech stocks. Investors anticipate a Federal Reserve rate cut decision on December 10, with an 89% probability priced into markets. The QQQ ETF has risen 3.83% over the past five days and is up 21.2% year-to-date, with a Moderate Buy consensus from analysts and an implied upside potential of 15.65%.

feed.title: DOLLAR TREE, INC. SEC 10-Q Report
feed.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. has released its Q3 fiscal year 2025 10-Q report, detailing significant financial growth with total revenue increasing by 9.4% to $4,751.0 million and net income rising by 4.8% to $244.6 million. The company expanded its store count, launched new product offerings, and initiated construction of new distribution centers to boost supply chain capabilities. Dollar Tree plans further expansion and enhancements to store conditions and customer experience.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics completes $1 billion notes offering
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics, Inc. has successfully completed a $1 billion notes offering, comprising $600 million of 5.250% Notes due in 2035 and $400 million of 5.750% Notes due in 2055. The proceeds are intended for general corporate purposes, including the repayment of existing debt. Executive Vice President and CFO Theresa E. Wagler emphasized the offering supports the company's long-term strategy and commitment to maintaining investment-grade credit ratings.

feed.title: Balancing Risk and Return: Public Pension Plan Allocations in a New Fixed Income Environment
feed.summary: This article analyzes public pension plan allocations in the new fixed income environment, highlighting that many plans may be accepting more volatility than necessary to meet return targets. It suggests that rising fixed income yields since 2022 present an opportunity for public defined benefit plans to reassess their strategic asset allocations. By rebalancing portfolios, pension plans could potentially reduce expected volatility without sacrificing their ability to meet required return targets.

feed.title: How Is Cencora’s Stock Performance Compared to Other Medical Stocks?
feed.summary: Cencora (COR) is a leading global pharmaceutical-services company with a market cap of $58.7 billion, demonstrating strong performance compared to other medical stocks. The stock has gained 18.9% over the past three months and 56.1% year-to-date, outperforming the Health Care Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLV). Analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating with a potential upside of 10.5%.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Announces Continuation of ADEPT-2 Phase 3 Study in Psychosis Associated with Alzheimer's Disease
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb announced the continuation of its ADEPT-2 Phase 3 study for psychosis associated with Alzheimer's Disease, following the identification of irregularities at some sites and subsequent agreement with the FDA and Data Monitoring Committee. The company will enroll additional patients to the original target study population to ensure data integrity and continue researching Cobenfy, a potential new treatment. This decision reaffirms BMS's commitment to rigorous clinical standards and addressing unmet medical needs in Alzheimer's disease.

feed.title: Dollar Tree Posts 9% Sales Growth and Beats EPS Q3 Expectations
feed.summary: Dollar Tree reported stronger-than-expected Q3 earnings, with EPS of $1.21 surpassing anticipated $1.09, and net sales reaching $4.7 billion, a 9.4% increase. The company's multi-price strategy and strong seasonal demand contributed to this growth. Dollar Tree also provided optimistic guidance for the fourth quarter and full fiscal year 2025, projecting net sales between $19.35 billion and $19.45 billion.

feed.title: Year in review: Garmin releases 2025 Garmin Connect Data Report
feed.summary: Garmin released its 2025 Garmin Connect Data Report, highlighting global fitness and health trends from its users. The report shows an 8% increase in recorded activities, with significant growth in racket sports, HIIT, and Pilates, and details activity, health, and fitness trends across various demographics and locales. Key findings include lower average stress scores for women, improved sleep, and regional differences in Body Battery levels and daily steps, with Hong Kong users taking the most steps.

feed.title: Celsius Holdings Highlights 2025 Execution Progress Ahead of Morgan Stanley Global Consumer & Retail Conference
feed.summary: Celsius Holdings provided an update on its 2025 brand integration efforts and the Alani Nu DSD transition ahead of the Morgan Stanley Global Consumer & Retail Conference. The company reports that over 80% of the Alani Nu DSD business has transitioned into the PepsiCo distribution network. Celsius Holdings' portfolio achieved a 20.2% market share and grew 25.5%, outpacing the energy drink category.

feed.title: Leadership | Duncan McKechnie
feed.summary: This article introduces Duncan McKechnie as the Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer at Vertex Pharmaceuticals. It details his extensive responsibilities, including overseeing global commercial activities and his previous leadership roles within the company's North America Commercial team and Global Health Economics and Pricing functions. McKechnie joined Vertex in 2013 after more than 13 years at Novartis, bringing significant commercial leadership experience to his current role.

feed.title: BD Launches New Cell Analyzer Configurations to Bring Cutting-Edge Capabilities to Labs of All Sizes
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) announced the global commercial release of new configurations for its BD FACSDiscover™ A8 Cell Analyzers. These new three- and four-laser instruments expand accessibility to breakthrough spectral and real-time imaging cell analysis, enabling more labs in academia, pharma, and biotech to advance discoveries in immunology, cancer immunotherapy, and cell biology. The analyzers feature BD SpectralFX™ Technology for analyzing 50+ cell characteristics and BD CellView™ Image Technology for high-speed imaging, with flexible upgrade options and financing available.

feed.title: Is Dominion Energy Stock Underperforming the S&P 500?
feed.summary: Dominion Energy (D) is significantly underperforming the S&P 500 across various timeframes despite its large market capitalization and 2025 Q3 adjusted EPS and revenue exceeding expectations. The stock's modest gains over the past three months, year-to-date, and 52 weeks lag considerably behind the broader market and its competitor NextEra Energy. Analysts are cautious, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a modest price target, highlighting concerns about limited upside.

feed.title: Oracle will emerge as an AI leader and see big gains ahead, Wells Fargo says
feed.summary: Wells Fargo initiated coverage of Oracle with an overweight rating and a $280 price target, projecting a 39% upside. Analyst Michael Turrin believes Oracle is poised to become an AI leader, citing its significant AI deals, strong backlog, and potential to become the fourth major cloud provider by 2029. Despite a recent decline in shares, Oracle's AI business is expected to drive substantial growth and market share gains.

feed.title: Akamai Technologies Achieves FedRAMP High Ready Status for Cloud Services Security Compliance
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies (AKAM) announced its Cloud has achieved FedRAMP High Ready status, validated by an accredited third-party assessment organization. This significant milestone positions Akamai to offer high-security cloud services to federal agencies handling sensitive data and critical missions, supporting capabilities like Zero Trust network segmentation and DDoS protection. While this status confirms readiness for stringent security requirements, Akamai notes that it is not yet a final FedRAMP authorization, which requires further approval from a federal agency.

feed.title: Dollar Tree (DLTR) Tops Q3 EPS by 12c, Offers Guidance
feed.summary: Dollar Tree (DLTR) reported strong Q3 earnings, exceeding analyst estimates by $0.12 with an EPS of $1.21. The company's revenue for the quarter matched consensus expectations at $4.7 billion. Furthermore, Dollar Tree provided optimistic guidance for FY2026, projecting EPS between $5.60-$5.80 and revenue of $19.35-$19.45 billion, both surpassing current consensus estimates.

feed.title: Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) Secures FedRAMP High Ready Stamp for Sensitive Federal Cloud
feed.summary: Akamai (NASDAQ: AKAM) announced that its Akamai Cloud has achieved FedRAMP High Ready status, signifying its readiness to provide secure cloud services to U.S. federal agencies handling highly sensitive data. This status, confirmed by a third-party assessment organization, indicates that Akamai Cloud meets stringent security requirements and supports high digital identity assurance levels. The company can now pursue formal FedRAMP High authorization, enabling federal agencies to leverage its security and delivery capabilities for critical missions.

feed.title: Dollar Tree, Inc. Reports Results for the Third Quarter Fiscal 2025
feed.summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (DLTR) reported strong third-quarter fiscal 2025 results, driven by its multi-price strategy, with a 4.2% increase in same-store net sales and diluted EPS of $1.20. The company also updated its full-year fiscal 2025 outlook for net sales and adjusted EPS, reflecting continued operational strength and share repurchases. These results include the successful conversion of 646 stores to the Dollar Tree 3.0 multi-price format and substantial share repurchases year-to-date.

feed.title: The Real Reason Your Mechanic Won’t Accept American Express
feed.summary: Mechanics and other small businesses often refuse American Express cards due to the significantly higher processing fees compared to Visa and Mastercard. While AmEx positions itself as a premium card attracting wealthier customers who spend more, some businesses, including large ones like Costco, do not accept it. The article details the fee differences, noting that AmEx charges between 1.43% + $0.10 and 3.30% + $0.10 per swipe, whereas Visa and Mastercard charge between 1.15% + $0.05 and 2.5% + $0.10.
